description: Customer found cheaper price, wants to cancel

turns.message: hey i just ordered those nike air max but found them $40 cheaper on amazon lol can i cancel
order #NKE-48291 and yeah will i get the refund back to my visa or do i need to do something

description: Tracking a late package

turns.message: hi, my order was supposed to arrive 3 days ago? can you check whats going on with it
the order number is 7834921 it was a birthday gift and now its too late honestly

description: Wrong item received, wants return and refund

turns.message: I ordered a blue jacket size M and you sent me a red hoodie size XL?? this is ridiculous
i dont want a replacement just give me my money back please
how long does the refund take to process? last time it took like 3 weeks which is insane

description: Double charged on credit card

turns.message: umm i just checked my credit card statement and you guys charged me twice for the same order?? order #3321-B
yeah its showing $89.99 twice on my amex ending in 4421. can you fix this asap

description: Billing issue not resolved, escalates to human

turns.message: I've been charged $299 for something I never ordered. This is fraud.
No I already tried that. The charge appeared 3 days ago and nobody has helped me. I want to speak with an actual person not a bot
THIS IS UNACCEPTABLE. Get me a manager RIGHT NOW or I'm calling my bank to dispute everything

description: Product inquiry leads to order tracking

turns.message: hey quick question does the sony WH-1000XM5 come with a carrying case or do i need to buy that separately
cool thanks! actually i ordered one last week, can you tell me when itll arrive? order 55219

description: Cancel then changes mind, wants to modify instead

turns.message: i need to cancel my order #ORD-8827
wait actually can i just change the size instead? i ordered large but need medium
yes medium please and can you also update the shipping address to 442 oak street

description: Spanish speaker - late delivery wants refund

turns.message: hola mi paquete no ha llegado y ya pasaron 10 dias, order number 2219-MX, necesito ayuda por favor
si ya se que dicen 5-7 dias pero its been 10 days and nothing!! quiero mi refund
esto es ridiculo i want to speak with someone who can actually help me please

description: Account locked, needs order status

turns.message: i cant login to my account it keeps saying account locked?? i was just trying to check on my order
my email is sarah.j@gmail.com and i think i put the wrong password too many times. can you unlock it and tell me if order #4412 shipped

description: Cancel subscription - straightforward

turns.message: Hi, I'd like to cancel my premium subscription. I'm not using it enough to justify the cost.
No thanks, I don't want a discount. Just cancel it effective immediately please. Account email is tom.wilson@outlook.com

description: Full return journey - return, refund, then feedback

turns.message: i need to return these boots they're falling apart after 2 weeks of normal use. this is terrible quality
yes i want a full refund not store credit. i paid $180 for boots that lasted 2 weeks
ok the return label came through thanks. when will i see the refund?
honestly you guys should do better quality control. ive been a customer for 3 years and this is the first time im this disappointed

description: French customer - product question then payment

turns.message: Bonjour, est-ce que le sac Louis Vuitton sur votre site est authentique? je veux etre sure avant d'acheter
ok merci. and do you accept paypal? je prefere ne pas utiliser ma carte de credit en ligne
parfait, i will order it then. merci beaucoup for your help!

description: Tracking shows delivered but never received

turns.message: your tracking says my package was delivered yesterday but i never got it. i was home all day
i checked with my neighbors and the mailroom, nothing. someone stole it or it was delivered to the wrong address
i need either a replacement sent ASAP or a full refund. this was a $340 purchase

description: Multiple issues - billing, cancel, refund, escalation

turns.message: so first off you charged me for express shipping that i never selected and second the order is wrong anyway
just cancel the whole thing and refund everything including the shipping charge. order ORD-1192
this is the 3rd time ive had problems with your company. is there someone senior i can talk to about this pattern of issues?

description: Happy customer - positive feedback

turns.message: just wanted to say that jessica in your support team was AMAZING. she helped me fix my account issue in like 5 minutes. give her a raise lol

description: Change shipping address before delivery

turns.message: Hi I just realized I put my old address on order #8843. Can I change the delivery address?
new address is 1520 Elm Street Apt 4B, Chicago IL 60614. Has it shipped yet or am I too late?

description: Account issue then subscription question

turns.message: hey so i forgot my password and the reset email never came?? its been 30 minutes
oh wait it went to spam lol nvm. while im here tho can i ask about upgrading my subscription to the annual plan? is there a discount

description: Multi-intent in single message - cancel and refund

turns.message: look i need to cancel order #2291 get a full refund to my original payment method and also i want to know why you charged me $15 for shipping when your site says free shipping over $50 and my order was $127

description: Product inquiry - item out of stock, disappointed

turns.message: do you guys still have the adidas ultraboost in size 11? the website is confusing me
ugh seriously out of stock again?? this is the third time. when are you getting more
this is honestly so frustrating. you guys really need to manage your inventory better. i keep coming back and its never available

description: Repeated shipping delays, gives up and wants human

turns.message: hi this is the second time im contacting you about order #3387. it was supposed to be here monday
ok so now it says thursday?? last time you told me wednesday. the date keeps moving
you know what forget it. im done dealing with bots. transfer me to a real person who can actually guarantee me a delivery date
if nobody can help me im just going to cancel and dispute the charge with my bank
